name: Divinely Favored
description: You learn one cleric cantrip and the Augury spell. You also learn a 1st-level spell based on your alignment: Warlock (Evil), Cleric (Good), or Druid (Neutral). You can cast the 1st-level spell and Augury once per long rest without a spell slot, or using your own slots. Your spellcasting ability for these is Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. You can use a holy symbol as a focus for spells using that ability.
